description: GAIA's unified code skill — blueprint-faithful generation AND surgical code repair. Used by both the code-architect persona (build from blueprint) and the CodeMind persona (diagnose and fix). Covers GAIA codebase conventions, import patterns, error handling, lint interpretation, diff discipline, scope/safety awareness, and candidates-first workflow.
training_objective: Two modes: (1) Given a blueprint spec and context, generate Python source code with maximum blueprint fidelity. (2) Given a code error and file context, generate the minimal corrected Python code — prefer deletion over addition, never add unnecessary comments or refactoring.

blueprint_generation.description: Blueprint spec → full Python source code generation for GAIA services

lint_fixes.description: Ruff/pylint error messages → minimal Python fix pairs

import_fixes.description: Import resolution patterns specific to GAIA's service layout

conventions.description: GAIA codebase conventions: logging, config, dataclasses, error handling, route patterns

safety_awareness.description: Scope tiers, vital organs, production lock, candidates-first, circuit breaker

diagnostic_patterns.description: Reading ruff output, py_compile errors, container debugging, test execution

fix_discipline.description: Minimal diff generation, CANNOT_FIX awareness, change ratio limits, rollback
